## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tests added or updated (unit + adapter where relevant)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm size` passes locally (budgets respected)
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `API.md`, or `docs/`) where relevant
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) for any user-facing change
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies in `@variantlab/core`
- [ ] No platform globals (`window`, `document`, `localStorage`, ...) in `@variantlab/core`
- [ ] SSR / Edge runtime behavior preserved
